title: The Excalibur Four
body:
Hi, I'm a Vietnamese
This resource pack will give you 4 of Excalibur in videogame/anime Fate Grand Order
Hope you like it

**Excalibur** - Golden Sword
**Excalibur Morgan** - Iron Sword
**Rising Excalibur** - Diamond Sword
**Awakening Excalibur Morgan** - Netherite Sword
